failure_reasons: **CRITICAL: Chinese text requirement not met** — Acceptance criteria 5 and 6 explicitly require Chinese text in the overlay ("⚠ 机器故障" and "⚡ 系统过载"), but the implementation displays English text ("⚠ SYSTEM FAILURE" and "⚡ CRITICAL OVERLOAD"). This is a contract violation.
